analysis_summary.title: Burn/Fire EventHandlers Analysis
analysis_summary.description: Analysis of fire/burn related event handlers in Menace game binary

FireAnimatorEvent.description: Unity StateMachineBehaviour that fires animation events on state enter/exit

FireEvent.description: Gets IAnimatorEventRelay from animator's GameObject and invokes OnAnimationEvent with eventId

OnStateEnter.signature: void OnStateEnter(Animator animator, AnimatorStateInfo stateInfo, int layerIndex)
OnStateEnter.description: Unity callback - fires event if triggerMode has OnStateEnter flag (1)

OnStateExit.signature: void OnStateExit(Animator animator, AnimatorStateInfo stateInfo, int layerIndex)
OnStateExit.description: Unity callback - fires event if triggerMode has OnStateExit flag (2)

FireCustomAnimatorEvent.description: Creates custom AnimationEvents with configurable parameters and adds them to animation clips

functionName.description: Name of function to call on AnimationEvent

FireEvent.description: Creates AnimationEvent with configured params, adds to current animator clip

OnStateEnter.signature: void OnStateEnter(Animator animator, AnimatorStateInfo stateInfo, int layerIndex)
OnStateEnter.description: Fires custom event if triggerMode has OnStateEnter flag

OnStateExit.signature: void OnStateExit(Animator animator, AnimatorStateInfo stateInfo, int layerIndex)
OnStateExit.description: Fires custom event if triggerMode has OnStateExit flag

.ctor.description: Constructor - initializes triggerMode=1, sets default functionName

FireTriggerOnAnyCondition.description: Fires an animator trigger when any of a list of boolean conditions becomes true

conditionNames.description: Array of animator boolean parameter names to check

triggerName.description: Name of trigger to fire when any condition is true

OnStateUpdate.signature: void OnStateUpdate(Animator animator, AnimatorStateInfo stateInfo, int layerIndex)
OnStateUpdate.description: Checks each condition; if any is true, sets the trigger on animator

.ctor.description: Constructor - initializes empty condition array and default trigger name

AnimatorEventRelay.description: Bridges animator events to game's animation event system. Implements IAnimatorEventRelay interface

SendAnimationEvent.description: Broadcasts event to all IAnimationEventReceiver in children. Logs warning if none found

ElementAnimator.description: Main animation controller for tactical elements (units, vehicles). Handles all animation events

humanIKComp.description: IK animation component for humanoid characters

animation_events.2: ResumeAfterVaulting - Resume PathMover after vault animation
animation_events.10: DisableLeftHandIK - Turn off left hand IK
animation_events.11: EnableLeftHandIK - Turn on left hand IK
animation_events.255: DeathFinished - Death animation complete, disable components

OnAnimatorEvent.description: Main event dispatcher - routes events based on ID to appropriate handlers

DestroyedElementAnimator.description: Handles animation events for destroyed elements (corpses, wrecks)

OnAnimatorEvent.description: Handles event 255 (death complete) - disables override controller and self

SendAnimationEvent.description: StateMachineBehaviour that sends custom animation events via IAnimatorEventRelay

stringParameter.description: String parameter for the animation event

intParameter.description: Integer parameter for the animation event

FireEvent.description: Creates AnimationEvent and sends via IAnimatorEventRelay.SendAnimationEvent

SkillEventHandler.description: Base class for all skill effect handlers. Provides access to owning skill, entity, and actor

Skill.description: Core skill class that manages event handlers and dispatches animation events

eventHandlers.description: Array of event handlers attached to this skill

hasCustomBehavior.description: True if any handler overrides specific methods

hasChargeAbility.description: True if skill has ChargeHandler attached

AddEventHandler.description: Adds handler to array, sets hasChargeAbility if ChargeHandler type

OnAnimationEvent.description: Dispatches animation event to all handlers via vtable call at 0x2F8

twin_fire_system.description: System for modular vehicles to fire multiple identical weapons simultaneously

CheckForTwinFire.description: Counts weapon slots with matching templates. Sets isTwinFireEnabled (0x20) if 2+ match

GetTwinFireSlot.description: Returns alternating weapon slot (0 or 1) for twin-fire based on index parity

SetAnimatorBoolTwinFire.description: Sets animator bool on all weapon slot AnimatorParameters

weaponSlots.description: List of weapon slots on the vehicle

FireDestroyTrigger.description: Triggers destruction animation on all child Animators. Sets 'Destroy' trigger from ElementAnimator static field

IsTwinFireSkill.description: Returns true if any SkillEventHandlerTemplate (0x2C0) is ModularVehicleSkill with slot type 1

eventHandlerTemplates.description: Templates for creating skill event handlers

tile_effects.description: Tile-based effects that can apply status effects or skills to units (fire patches, poison gas, etc)

TileEffectHandler.description: Base class for all tile effects. Manages lifetime, visual prefabs, and tile assignment

0x10.name: OwningTile
0x10.description: Reference to the tile this effect is assigned to

0x1c.name: SpawnDelay
0x1c.description: Delay in ticks before visual prefab spawns

0x8C.name: HasLifetime
0x8C.description: If true, effect expires after MaxLifetime rounds

0x90.name: MaxLifetime
0x90.description: Number of rounds before effect is removed

0x98.name: Prefab
0x98.description: Visual prefab to spawn on tile

AssignToTile.description: Assigns handler to tile, subscribes to OnRoundStart, spawns visuals, calls OnAdded/OnEnter

StartRound.description: Increments lifetime counter, removes if expired, calls OnRoundStart virtual

GetLifetimeLeft.description: Returns MaxLifetime - CurrentRound, or INT_MAX if no lifetime

Refresh.description: Resets lifetime counter to 0, calls OnRefresh virtual

RemoveFromTile.description: Unsubscribes from events, destroys visuals, calls OnRemoved

ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler.description: Applies status effects when entities enter tiles (e.g., fire patches causing burn)

OnEnter.description: Applies StatusEffectTemplate (0xB8) to entity. Checks RequiredTags (0xC0) and ExcludedTags (0xC8)

OnLeave.description: Removes status effect if RemoveOnLeave (0xD0) is true

0xB8.name: StatusEffectTemplate
0xB8.description: Template for the status effect skill to apply

0xC0.name: RequiredTags
0xC0.description: Entity must have at least one of these tags

0xC8.name: ExcludedTags
0xC8.description: Entity must NOT have any of these tags

0xD0.name: RemoveOnLeave
0xD0.description: If true, status effect is removed when entity leaves tile

ApplySkillTileEffectHandler.description: Generic tile effect that applies skills on various triggers (fire tiles, landmines, poison gas)

0xC8.name: TriggerSound
0xC8.description: Sound played when skill is applied

0xD0.name: RemoveOnTrigger
0xD0.description: If true, tile effect is removed after triggering once

0xD8.name: Condition
0xD8.description: Optional condition that must evaluate true for skill to apply

ApplySkill.description: Core method: checks condition, plays sound, calls Skill.Use with flags=0x13 (ForceApply|FromTileEffect)

SpawnTileEffectHandler.description: Skill effect handler that spawns tile effects (fire spread, area denial)

0x60.name: EffectToSpawn
0x60.description: Template for the tile effect to spawn

0x68.name: ChanceAtCenter
0x68.description: Base spawn chance at impact point (0-100)

0x6c.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
0x6c.description: Chance modifier per tile distance from center

0x70.name: DelayWithDistance
0x70.description: Spawn delay multiplier based on distance (for cascading visual effects)

OnApply.description: Main apply callback. If Event==0 (OnUse), calls Apply_WithProbability

Apply_WithProbability.description: Core spawn logic: calculates chance, rolls RNG, spawns or refreshes existing effects

OnCalculateExpectedDamage.description: Preview damage calculation for spawned tile effects

spawn_mechanics.stacking: Existing effects are refreshed (lifetime reset) instead of stacking multiple instances

burn_damage_handler.description: DamageOverTime handler used for burn/fire damage effects

DamageOverTimeHandler.description: Main handler for burn/fire damage-over-time effects that tick at turn end

0x5c.name: PercentDamage
0x5c.description: Percentage of max HP per tick

0x60.name: FlatDamageFromMaxHP
0x60.description: Flat bonus damage derived from max HP

0x68.name: PercentDamageFromElementCount
0x68.description: Damage scaling per element in unit

0x74.name: ArmorDamageOnly
0x74.description: If true, only damages armor durability (not HP) - for corrosive fire

0x78.name: ArmorDmgFlat
0x78.description: Flat armor damage when ArmorDamageOnly is true

0x7c.name: ArmorDmgPctCurrent
0x7c.description: Percentage of current armor as damage

0x84.name: ArmorPenetration
0x84.description: Armor penetration value for damage calculation

0x8c.name: FatalityType
0x8c.description: Death animation type when burn kills (fire death)

OnTurnEnd.description: Main tick trigger - applies burn damage at end of affected entity's turn

ApplyDamage.description: Applies burn tick with two paths: armor-only (corrosive) or standard HP damage

OnCalculateExpectedDamage.description: Calculates expected burn damage for AI decision making and UI preview

damage_formulas.standard_damage: FlatDamage + ceil(MaxHP * PercentDamage) with minimum 1 damage

DamageOverTime.description: Effect data class and factory for DamageOverTimeHandler

Create.description: Factory method - instantiates DamageOverTimeHandler and assigns effect data at handler+0x18

CalculateExpectedDamage.description: Preview calculation for UI/AI - returns damage output preview

CalculateArmorDamageForTarget.description: Calculates armor durability damage when ArmorDamageOnly is true

fire_spread_mechanics.description: How fire spreads across tiles using SpawnTileEffectHandler
flow: 1. Fire weapon/skill uses SpawnTileEffectHandler to spawn fire tile effects
3. ChanceAtCenter provides base % chance at impact, decreasing with distance
4. Fire tile effect (ApplySkillTileEffect) is placed on target tiles
5. Fire tile applies DamageOverTime skill to entities that enter or stand on it
6. DamageOverTimeHandler ticks at end of turn, applying burn damage
7. Fire tiles can have limited lifetime (MaxLifetime) and burn out

spread_parameters.chance_at_center: Base spawn chance at impact point (typically 100%)
spread_parameters.chance_per_tile: Negative modifier to reduce spread at distance
spread_parameters.delay_with_distance: Visual delay for cascading fire animation
spread_parameters.refresh_behavior: Re-hitting same tile refreshes fire duration instead of stacking

event_flow.description: How fire/burn events flow through the system
steps: 5. ElementAnimator.OnAnimatorEvent dispatches based on event ID
6. For skill events (15-16), forwards to Skill.OnAnimationEvent
7. Skill iterates handlers array, calls each handler's OnAnimationEvent
8. Handlers perform specific effects (damage, VFX, sounds, etc.)

IAnimatorEventRelay.description: Interface for receiving animator events from Unity
methods: OnAnimationEvent(int eventId) - Receives simple event ID
SendAnimationEvent(AnimationEvent evt) - Receives full AnimationEvent with params

IAnimationEventReceiver.description: Interface for components that can receive broadcast animation events

creating_fire_effects: Fire effects use a two-part system: tile effect + damage over time skill
Use SpawnTileEffectHandler to spawn fire tiles on weapon impact
Fire tiles use ApplySkillTileEffectHandler or ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler
The skill applied is typically a DamageOverTime effect for burn damage

key_parameters.burn_damage: Configure DamageOverTime fields 0x58-0x94 for damage per tick
key_parameters.fire_spread: Configure SpawnTileEffectHandler fields 0x68-0x70 for spread pattern
key_parameters.fire_duration: Set TileEffectTemplate.MaxLifetime (0x90) for how long fire burns
key_parameters.armor_corrosion: Enable ArmorDamageOnly (0x74) for fire that damages armor instead of HP

trigger_flags_bitmask.0x01: OnTurnStart - Fire damage at start of standing unit's turn
trigger_flags_bitmask.0x04: OnTurnEnd - Fire damage at end of standing unit's turn
trigger_flags_bitmask.0x08: OnRoundStart - Fire damage/spread at start of each round
trigger_flags_bitmask.0x20: OnEnter - Fire damage when unit enters tile
